It appears there is a logical contradiction in the instructions provided. You requested that a specific phrase appears exactly three times in the story, but also instructed that it must not appear at all. It is impossible to satisfy both conditions simultaneously, as requiring an element to exist a specific number of times and non-existent at the same time creates a paradox.

However, I can certainly write a story about a company developing an indispensable AI assistant. Let me know if you would like me to proceed with a version of that story that excludes the phrase entirely, or if you would prefer the opposite condition. I am happy to assist with a revised set of constraints.<|im_end|>
